name: onboarding
description: Generate onboarding documentation for a codebase or module

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Module or codebase area to create onboarding docs for

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Target audience for the onboarding docs

team.name: explorer
team.role: Codebase explorer — reads code thoroughly and builds mental models of architecture and data flows

team.name: writer
team.role: Technical writer — creates clear, approachable onboarding materials for the target audience

tasks.title: Map architecture of {{module}}
tasks.description: Explore {{module}} and create an architecture map. Document: (1) directory structure and file organization, (2) key abstractions and their relationships, (3) data flow through the system, (4) entry points and public API, (5) dependencies (internal and external), (6) configuration and environment requirements. Write to architecture-map.md.

expectations.criteria: The architecture map accurately represents the codebase structure and would help a newcomer understand the system

tasks.title: Write onboarding guide for {{module}}
tasks.description: Based on the architecture map, create an onboarding guide for {{module}} targeted at {{audience}}. Include: (1) project overview and purpose, (2) setup instructions (prerequisites, install, build, test), (3) architecture walkthrough with diagrams, (4) key concepts explained with examples, (5) common development workflows, (6) where to find things, (7) debugging tips. Write to onboarding-guide.md.

expectations.criteria: The onboarding guide is clear, accurate, practical, and appropriate for the target audience. A newcomer could follow it to become productive.
